zh: 幼兒到兒童前期的孩子已逐漸由家庭的單純哺育環境下、
en: Children from toddlerhood into early childhood gradually move

zh: 走向托兒所、幼兒園等團體生活、
en: from the simple family setting into group life — daycare, preschool.

zh: 所以除了教導孩子適應家庭中的人際關係之外、
en: So beyond helping them adjust to family relationships,

zh: 還要留意孩子的社會技巧、
en: we must also tend to a child's social skills.

zh: 例如不可隨意攻訐別人、
en: For instance, they must not casually attack others,

zh: 不能有太強烈的嫉妒和敵意、
en: nor harbor intense jealousy or hostility,

zh: 以便親切和氣的與所有孩童相處、
en: so they can get along warmly with all children,
